description.ko: 백색광이 유리를 통해 스펙트럼 구성 요소로 분리되는 과정을 중심으로, 복잡한 빛의 물리학을 렌더링하는 PRISM-2 엔진의 능력을 보여주는 시각적 연구입니다.
description.en: A visual study of the PRISM-2 engine's ability to render complex light physics, specifically focusing on the separation of white light into its spectral components through glass.

prompt: Cinematic macro photography of a triangular crystal prism on a dark velvet surface. A single sharp beam of white light enters the prism and refracts into a brilliant, wide-angled rainbow spectrum. High contrast, caustic light patterns, ethereal glow, 8k resolution, sharp focus on the internal light dispersion.
